Secondly, this district has claimed that we were in a fiscal crisis as of last year. This rationale
was the basis for closing six schools on the north side, terminating every librarian position in the
district, and defunding the gifted and talented program, which ultimately required parental funding
to continue. In light of the district's financial crisis and the financial risks rooted in vouchers
